tagline: Rhythms of the deep urban pulse.
voice: The brand voice is confident and atmospheric, echoing the nocturnal energy of underground clubs. It speaks with an understated intensity, focusing on the immersive experience rather than overt hype.
logo_style_brief: A flat MONOCHROME condensed techno wordmark reading 'NIGHTSHIFT' — single solid colour on transparent, heavy and geometric, no gradient/glow, designed to vectorize cleanly to a crisp SVG lockup.
photo_style_tokens: moody low-key club stage, real magenta+cyan neon and LED in frame, atmospheric haze, candid documentary, crushed blacks
invented: Specific font choices (Archivo for heading, Inter for body)
Specific color names (Nightshift Magenta, Electric Cyan, Club Black, Type White)
